summary_en: Use the Distill thread homepage as the entry point for the full Circuits sequence and understand how the articles fit together.
summary_zh: 把 Distill 线程首页当成整条 Circuits 学习线的入口，先看清文章之间的拼接关系。
notebook_scope_en: This entry is reading-only. It maps the thread, the article order, and what each live notebook adds on top of the original Distill writing.
notebook_scope_zh: 这一篇是只读入口页，用来交代整条线程、文章顺序，以及各个 live notebook 在原始 Distill 写作之外补了什么。
integrity_note_en: This item is intentionally reading-only because the Distill thread page is a narrative entry point rather than a single experiment notebook.
integrity_note_zh: 这一项刻意保留为只读，因为 Distill 线程首页本质上是叙事入口，而不是单篇实验 notebook。

title_en: Zoom In: An Introduction to Circuits
summary_en: Run a live visual-circuits walkthrough on InceptionV1: feature visualization, real-image validation, orientation tuning, and a small circuit trace.
summary_zh: 在 InceptionV1 上跑一条 live 视觉电路入门线：feature visualization、真实图片验证、方向调谐和一条小型 circuit trace。
notebook_scope_en: This notebook keeps the article's intuition but rebuilds it with live public-stack outputs instead of pre-rendered figures.
notebook_scope_zh: 这本 notebook 保留原文的直觉主线，但把关键图和测量改成公开栈上的实时产出，而不是预渲染图片。
live_sections_en: Activation maximization on representative channels
CIFAR-10 validation for a curve-preferring neuron
Orientation tuning on synthetic arc stimuli
A small upstream-weight trace for one mixed3b circuit
live_sections_zh: 代表性通道的激活最大化
曲线偏好神经元的 CIFAR-10 真实图片验证
合成弧线刺激上的方向调谐
一条 mixed3b 小型电路的上游权重 trace

paper_refs.title: Zoom In: An Introduction to Circuits

integrity_note_en: This is a live public-stack reconstruction of the article's core moves. It does not claim to reproduce every bespoke figure or manual annotation from the Distill page.
integrity_note_zh: 这是对原文核心动作的公开栈 live 重建，但不宣称复现 Distill 页面里的每一张定制图或人工注释。

title_en: An Overview of Early Vision in InceptionV1
summary_en: Survey early InceptionV1 layers with live feature renders, family-response statistics, and layer-by-layer channel snapshots.
summary_zh: 用 live feature render、family-response 统计和逐层通道快照，梳理 InceptionV1 的早期视觉层。
notebook_scope_en: The notebook samples early layers directly from a pretrained InceptionV1 and summarizes how feature families broaden from edges to small motifs.
notebook_scope_zh: 这本 notebook 直接从公开 InceptionV1 里采样早期层，概括 feature 家族如何从边缘扩展到小型图案。
live_sections_en: Layer-by-layer feature render gallery
Synthetic family response heatmap across early layers
Real-image activation snapshots for selected channels
live_sections_zh: 逐层 feature render 图库
早期层上的合成刺激家族响应热图
选定通道的真实图片激活快照

paper_refs.title: An Overview of Early Vision in InceptionV1

integrity_note_en: This notebook uses live renders and measured activations on the public model. The scope is teaching-scale, but every figure is produced at runtime.
integrity_note_zh: 这本 notebook 在公开模型上用 live render 和实测激活做分析。规模是教学尺度，但所有图都在运行时生成。

summary_en: Search for curve-preferring channels live, compare line/arc/curvature stimuli, and validate the best channel on real images.
summary_zh: 实时搜索曲线偏好通道，对比直线、弧线和曲率刺激，并用真实图片验证最佳通道。
notebook_scope_en: Instead of replaying a static story, the notebook searches the model for curve-preferring channels at runtime and then tests what makes them special.
notebook_scope_zh: 这本 notebook 不再复读静态故事，而是在运行时直接搜索曲线偏好通道，再检验它们到底偏好什么。
live_sections_en: Curve-preference search inside mixed3b
Line versus arc versus circle response comparisons
Real-image validation for the strongest curve channel
live_sections_zh: 在 mixed3b 里搜索曲线偏好通道
直线、弧线和整圆刺激对比
对最强曲线通道做真实图片验证
integrity_note_en: The search space and validation set are smaller than the Distill write-up, but the detector discovery and measurements are generated live on the public model.
integrity_note_zh: 搜索空间和验证集都比 Distill 原文更小，但检测器发现和测量都是在公开模型上实时生成的。

title_en: Naturally Occurring Equivariance in Neural Networks
title_zh: 神经网络中的自然涌现等变性
summary_en: Find transformed filter pairs live, compare rotated and translated responses, and inspect how feature families move together.
summary_zh: 实时寻找变换对应的滤波器对，比对旋转和平移响应，观察 feature 家族如何一起移动。
notebook_scope_en: The notebook demonstrates equivariant structure by searching weight-space similarities and then validating them with stimulus sweeps.
notebook_scope_zh: 这本 notebook 先在权重空间里搜索等变结构，再用刺激 sweep 去验证这些关系。
live_sections_en: Rotation-similar filter-pair search in Inception branches
Rotated arc response sweeps for matched channels
Translated-stimulus response consistency checks
live_sections_zh: 在 Inception 分支里搜索旋转相似滤波器对
匹配通道的旋转弧线响应 sweep
平移刺激上的响应一致性检查

paper_refs.title: Naturally Occurring Equivariance in Neural Networks

integrity_note_en: This is a teaching-scale live analysis of equivariant structure in public InceptionV1 weights and activations, not a claim to reproduce every Distill case study.
integrity_note_zh: 这是对公开 InceptionV1 权重和激活中等变结构的教学尺度 live 分析，不宣称逐一复现 Distill 原文里的所有案例。

summary_en: Generate directional high-low frequency transitions live and measure which channels prefer these frequency edges.
summary_zh: 实时生成有方向性的高低频过渡刺激，并测量哪些通道偏好这种频率边界。
notebook_scope_en: The notebook synthesizes frequency-edge stimuli at runtime and searches for channels that respond strongly and selectively to them.
notebook_scope_zh: 这本 notebook 在运行时合成频率边界刺激，并搜索对它们强响应且具有选择性的通道。
live_sections_en: High-low frequency stimulus generation
Channel search for frequency-edge preference
Orientation tuning for the best frequency detector
live_sections_zh: 高低频刺激生成
频率边界偏好通道搜索
最佳频率检测器的方向调谐
integrity_note_en: The stimuli are generated live with simple public code. The resulting figures are runtime measurements, not bundled replicas of the Distill artwork.
integrity_note_zh: 刺激由公开代码实时生成，图像和曲线都是运行时测量结果，而不是仓库内打包好的 Distill 图片副本。

summary_en: Trace a curve circuit through mixed3a and mixed3b with live upstream importance, ablation, and a minimal proxy model.
summary_zh: 通过 live 的上游重要度、消融和最小代理模型，在 mixed3a 与 mixed3b 之间追踪一条曲线电路。
notebook_scope_en: The notebook turns one curve circuit into a public-stack trace: find upstream channels, ablate them, and compare the real target response to a minimal proxy.
notebook_scope_zh: 这本 notebook 把一条曲线电路改写成公开栈可跑的 trace：找上游通道、做消融，再把真实目标响应和最小代理模型对比起来。
live_sections_en: Upstream importance search from mixed3b back to mixed3a
Ablation on the top contributing upstream channels
Minimal proxy-model comparison against the true target response
live_sections_zh: 从 mixed3b 回溯到 mixed3a 的上游重要度搜索
对最关键上游通道做消融
最小代理模型与真实目标响应对比
integrity_note_en: This notebook uses live weights, activations, and ablations from public InceptionV1. It is a teaching-scale circuit trace, not a complete rebuild of every Distill artifact.
integrity_note_zh: 这本 notebook 直接使用公开 InceptionV1 的实时权重、激活和消融结果。它是教学尺度的 circuit trace，不是 Distill 原文所有工件的完整重建。

summary_en: Visualize real InceptionV1 weights directly and compare what weight views reveal versus what feature visualizations reveal.
summary_zh: 直接可视化真实的 InceptionV1 权重，并比较权重视角和 feature visualization 视角各自揭示了什么。
notebook_scope_en: This notebook stays entirely in runtime-generated weight views and pairs them with live feature renders so the comparison is grounded in the same channels.
notebook_scope_zh: 这本 notebook 全程使用运行时生成的权重视图，再配上同一批通道的 live feature render，让两种视角建立直接对应。
live_sections_en: Direct visualization of first-layer RGB filters
Energy-map views for deeper convolutional filters
Weight-view versus feature-view comparisons on matched channels
live_sections_zh: 第一层 RGB 滤波器直接可视化
更深卷积滤波器的能量图视角
同一通道上的权重视角与 feature 视角对比
integrity_note_en: All visualizations are generated at runtime from public model weights. No pre-rendered weight figures are bundled in the repository.
integrity_note_zh: 所有图像都在运行时直接从公开模型权重生成，仓库里不再打包任何预渲染的权重图。

summary_en: Measure how different Inception branches respond to line, arc, and frequency families, then render branch-specific exemplars live.
summary_zh: 测量不同 Inception 分支对直线、弧线和频率刺激家族的响应，再实时渲染各分支的代表性通道。
notebook_scope_en: The notebook studies specialization as a live branch-by-family response pattern rather than as a static diagram imported from the paper.
notebook_scope_zh: 这本 notebook 把分支专门化写成一张 live 的“分支 × 刺激家族”响应图，而不是从论文里搬一张静态示意图。
live_sections_en: Branch-wise response heatmap across stimulus families
Top-channel search inside each branch
Live feature renders for branch-specific exemplars
live_sections_zh: 刺激家族上的分支响应热图
各分支内部的 top-channel 搜索
分支代表通道的 live feature render
integrity_note_en: The specialization story here comes from live measurements on public branches and stimuli. It is meant to be transparent and inspectable rather than exhaustively paper-faithful.
integrity_note_zh: 这里的专门化结论来自公开分支和公开刺激上的实时测量，目标是透明可检查，而不是穷尽式地追平论文所有细节。

summary_en: Analyze the final classifier weight matrix live: reorder classes and channels, visualize bands, and compare against shuffled baselines.
summary_zh: 实时分析最终分类器权重矩阵：重排行与列、可视化带状结构，并和打乱基线比较。
notebook_scope_en: This notebook treats banding as a live weight-analysis problem on the public classifier head rather than a static export of a finished figure.
notebook_scope_zh: 这本 notebook 把带状结构当成公开分类头上的实时权重分析问题来做，而不是直接导出一张完成图。
live_sections_en: Final-layer weight-matrix reordering
Band-span versus shuffled-baseline measurements
Candidate class-group inspection from the reordered matrix
live_sections_zh: 最终层权重矩阵重排
带宽跨度与打乱基线的比较
从重排矩阵里检查候选类别分组
integrity_note_en: The matrix views and banding scores are computed live from the public classifier head. This is a runtime analysis notebook, not a bundled static export.
integrity_note_zh: 矩阵图和 banding 分数都直接从公开分类头实时计算而来。这是运行时分析 notebook，不是预先打包好的静态导出。
